# barracudawaf_allow_or_deny_client (Resource)

`barracudawaf_allow_or_deny_client` manages `Allow or Deny Client` on the Barracuda Web Application Firewall.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "barracudawaf_allow_or_deny_client" "test_adc" {
    name = "test_terraform_adc"
    parent = [ "DemoApp1" ]
    action = "Deny"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- **name** (String) Rule Name
- **parent** (List of String) Parent format: [service_name]

### Optional

- **action** (String) Action
- **certificate_serial** (String) Certificate Serial Number
- **common_name** (String) Common Name
- **country** (String) Country
- **locality** (String) Locality
- **organization** (String) Organization
- **organizational_unit** (String) Organizational Unit
- **sequence** (String) Sequence
- **state** (String) State
- **status** (String) Status
